nasb.text: Smoke went up out of His nostrils, And fire from His mouth devoured; Coals were kindled by it.

esv.text: Smoke went up from his nostrils, and devouring fire from his mouth; glowing coals flamed forth from him.

cnv.text: 濃煙從他的鼻孔往上冒， 烈火從他的口中噴出來， 連炭也燒著了。

ccb.text: 祂的鼻孔冒烟， 口喷烈焰和火炭。

csbs.text: 浓烟从他的鼻孔上腾， 焚烧的火焰从他口中而出， 火炭也从他那里燃起。
